description_long: This object is a sleek, modern knife or short sword with a streamlined, leaf-shaped blade and a flat, wooden-textured upper surface. The blade is double-edged, tapering to a sharp point at both ends, and features a smooth, continuous curve along its length. The lower portion of the blade is finished in a glossy red, contrasting with the white and metallic accents along the edge. The handle is integrated into the body, lacking a distinct grip or pommel, and the entire object has a minimalist, almost futuristic design. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements, emphasizing function over ornamentation. The object appears solid and robust, suitable for display or practical use in a contemporary urban setting.
description: A sleek, leaf-shaped knife or short sword with a wooden-textured top, glossy red lower blade, and minimalist design. The object is double-edged and lacks visible ornamentation or a distinct handle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved, leaf-like blade profile, glossy red lower section, and flat wooden-textured top.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the symmetrical, leaf-shaped outline and the full extent of the wooden-textured surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same red lower blade and white edge visible.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the pointed ends and the continuous, smooth blade curvature.
attribute_handle_design: integrated, flat, wooden-textured, no distinct grip or pommel
